note: This EPD uses the Detergents PCR module structure (Upstream/Core/Downstream) rather than the standard EN 15804 A1-A3 modules, so no discrete A1-A3 value is reported. The values given here are the cradle-to-grave TOTAL columns: GWP-GHG=1.63, GWP-fossil=1.44, GWP-biogenic=-0.353, GWP-total=1.26 (plus land use 0.175). Declared unit is 1 kg of product including packaging. These totals are not strictly equivalent to a production-stage A1-A3 figure.
